REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100016034) AS TO DEFENDANT RUOHO, CHENAH SYBIL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-09-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUOHO, CHENAH SYBIL $4,396.45 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,680.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100016034)
